description_cn:
测量两个三角形之间围绕其公共边的当前角度。

测量两个三角形之间的夹角，实际测试得出的是两个三角形所在平面的最小夹角。
description_en:
Measure the current angle between two triangles about their common edge。

Measuring the included angle between two triangles, the actual test yields the smallest included angle between the planes containing the two triangles.

parameters.name: P1
parameters.desc_cn: 两个三角形共享的公共边的起点
parameters.desc_en: Start of the common edge shared by both triangles

parameters.name: P2
parameters.desc_cn: 两个三角形共享的公共边的末端
parameters.desc_en: End of the common edge shared by both triangles

author: Kangaroo Team
